verdict: CRITICAL RISK: US-Israel-Iran war Day 9+ sustains energy/supply volatility; new escalations in Lebanon/Dubai/Abu Dhabi; macro econ rate-limited, AI/tech: Netflix acquires AI film tools company, Pentagon labels Anthropic national security risk, China BCI advances.

signals.geopolitical_driver: Day 9+: Lebanon peacekeeper hits, Israel Beirut/Tehran strikes, Iran Abu Dhabi US base strike, Dubai drone skyscraper hit, Europe retaliation warning (France24/NYT/Reuters/Daily Mail/Guardian)
signals.oil_price: Sustained high on ME risks, new Gulf/Abu Dhabi strikes
signals.shipping: Maersk pauses ME-Asia/Europe (ongoing); seafarer strikes Greece over Gulf strandings
signals.ai_tech: Netflix acquires InterPositive (AI film tools, Reuters 19h); Pentagon declares Anthropic national security risk (NBC 19h); China BCI practical use in 3-5yrs (Reuters 11h)
